creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Both CPU and MB are very old:
* Intel(R) Core(TM) i7 CPU         930  @ 2.80GHz
* P6X58D PREMIUM

The latest NVidia driver and the NVidia graphics card are installed.

No messages are added to the log during crash.
Picture on the monitor becomes distorted - something changes in the colors and shapes.

What might be a problem?
